hero.title: Craft Your Dream Home
hero.subtitle: A home decoration showcase and light-booking platform for homeowners, designers, and renovation companies
about.title: Clearer References for Home Decisions
about.desc: Hezeyun currently focuses on provider profiles, inspiration cases, and light appointment leads. After a booking is submitted, platform staff follow up offline.
about.owner.title: Homeowner
about.owner.desc: Browse profiles and cases, book a designer or renovation company, and let the platform assist with follow-up.
about.designer.title: Designer
about.designer.desc: Showcase portfolios, service areas, reference pricing, and design styles so homeowners can understand your strengths.
about.worker.title: Renovation Company
about.worker.desc: Display company profiles, cases, service scope, and contact information for appointment inquiries.
features.title: Understand First, Book Lightly
features.inspiration.title: Inspiration Gallery
features.inspiration.desc: Browse real renovation cases and style inspiration to clarify your direction.
features.match.title: Smart Matching
features.match.desc: View designers, renovation companies, foremen, and material shops by city, category, style, and budget.
features.booking.title: Online Booking
features.booking.desc: Currently only designers and renovation companies can be booked. Platform staff confirm details offline.
features.chat.title: Platform Follow-up
features.chat.desc: Platform staff record bookings, contact progress, and notes to reduce repeated communication.
features.project.title: Profile Maintenance
features.project.desc: Designer, foreman, renovation company, and material shop profiles are maintained by platform operators.
features.payment.title: Offline Service
features.payment.desc: The platform currently does not provide online transactions, payments, refunds, or fulfillment management.
gallery.title: Discover Your Dream Home
gallery.desc: Curated real renovation cases spanning Nordic, Modern, Japanese, Chinese, and more styles.
process.title: Light Booking Flow
process.step1.title: Browse Ideas
process.step1.desc: View cases, styles, and provider profiles first
process.step2.title: Choose Provider
process.step2.desc: Select a designer or renovation company
process.step3.title: Submit Booking
process.step3.desc: Leave contact details, address, and needs
process.step4.title: Platform Contact
process.step4.desc: Platform staff verify needs and follow up offline
process.step5.title: Offline Discussion
process.step5.desc: Plans, pricing, and services are confirmed offline
join.title: Service Provider Profiles
join.desc: Designer, foreman, renovation company, and material shop profiles are maintained by platform operators. Merchant self-onboarding is currently closed.
join.benefit1.title: Profile Review
join.benefit1.desc: The platform reviews basic materials before public display
join.benefit2.title: Brand Building
join.benefit2.desc: Showcase work, earn reviews, build your reputation
join.benefit3.title: Booking Leads
join.benefit3.desc: Platform staff follow up offline after users submit bookings
join.benefit4.title: Ongoing Maintenance
join.benefit4.desc: Cases, prices, service areas, and product information can be updated by operators
download.title: Start with Inspiration and Booking
download.desc: The live service focuses on mini-program light booking. The website does not handle online transactions, payments, refunds, or order fulfillment.
download.preview.designer.title: Find Designers
download.preview.designer.subtitle: Verified design services
download.preview.contractor.title: Find Contractors
download.preview.contractor.subtitle: Trusted Local Teams
download.preview.gallery.title: Inspiration Gallery
download.preview.gallery.subtitle: Curated Real Cases
app.name: Hezeyun
footer.summary: A home decoration showcase and light-booking platform for homeowners, designers, renovation companies, and material shops.
footer.contact.address: F7-7004, Minsheng Department Store Jiefang Road, No.103 Jiefang Road, Xincheng District, Xi’an, Shaanxi
